Event: The Illusory Adventure
Event Date: 03/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E55
Lifesaving Illusion Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, the unit removes 3 random negative effects and enhances themselves. It restores 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 15% / 17% /
20% health, while their physical and magic armor, fortitude, and incoming healing increase by 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enhanced unit also restores 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 / 300000 health for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
50000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, the unit removes 4 random negative effects from themselves and 2 nearest allied units, and enhances the ability's targets. The units restore 20% / 21% / 22% / 23% / 25% / 27% / 30% health, while their physical and magic armor, fortitude, and incoming healing increase by 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% / 37% / 40% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enhanced units also restore 64700 / 92400 / 132000 / 176000 /
220000 / 271000 / 350000 health for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 3
100000 Health from the gems
Once in a while, the unit removes all negative effects from themselves and 3 nearest allied units, and enhances the ability's targets. The units restore 30% / 31% / 32% / 33% / 35% 37% / 40% health, while their physical and magic armor, fortitude, and incoming healing Increase by 40% / 41% / 42% / 43% / 45% / 47% / 50% for 4 sec. Stacks up to 3 times. The enhanced units also restore 74100 / 105800 / 151200 / 201600 / 252000 / 315000 / 400000 health for 3 sec.
